# Modrzejewski.IT - Detailed LLM Index

Base URL: https://modrzejewski.it
Primary topic: Salesforce solution architecture, integration, and enterprise data activation.

## Navigation
- Home: https://modrzejewski.it/
- Blog: https://modrzejewski.it/blog
- Tags: https://modrzejewski.it/tags
- Blog Index (Machine): https://modrzejewski.it/llm/blog
- Projects Index (Machine): https://modrzejewski.it/llm/projects
- About Me: https://modrzejewski.it/about-me
- Contact: https://modrzejewski.it/contact

## Tag Pages
- Tag hub: https://modrzejewski.it/tags
- Tag route pattern: https://modrzejewski.it/tags/<tag-slug>
- Example tags:
	- https://modrzejewski.it/tags/salesforce
	- https://modrzejewski.it/tags/data-cloud

## Blog Entries
### How to Debug Salesforce Automation Event-Triggered Flows
- URL: https://modrzejewski.it/blog/the-missing-link-how-to-debug-salesforce-automation-event-triggered-flows
- Category: Architecture
- Published: 2026-03-13
- Author: Dominik Modrzejewski
- Tags: Marketing Cloud, Flow, Data 360, Debugging, Automation
- Summary: A practical guide to debugging Salesforce Automation Event-Triggered Flows when $Record is null, including the subflow pattern and live end-to-end validation with Automated Process debug logs.

### A Pivotal Shift in Salesforce Data 360 Pricing
- URL: https://modrzejewski.it/blog/unlocking-the-enterprise-data-360-a-pivotal-shift-in-salesforce-data-cloud-pricing
- Category: Architecture
- Published: 2026-03-11
- Author: Dominik Modrzejewski
- Tags: Data 360, Pricing, Agentforce, Agentic Enterprise
- Summary: An architect-focused analysis of Salesforce Data 360 pricing changes, including zero-cost batch ingestion, predictable profile pricing, and flex credit scaling economics.

## Project Case Studies
### Totalizator Sportowy: Salesforce Commerce and Retail Foundation
- URL: https://modrzejewski.it/projects/totalizator-sportowy-salesforce-commerce-retail-foundation
- Tags: Salesforce, Data Cloud, Snowflake, Marketing Cloud, API Integration
- Summary: Architected the Salesforce foundation for both e-commerce and retail channels, integrating Snowflake and Salesforce Data Cloud through zero-copy federation. Defined data models and API integrations enabling a unified customer view and cross-channel activation in Marketing Cloud.

### PwC (UK Enterprise Client): Enterprise Data Integration and Activation
- URL: https://modrzejewski.it/projects/pwc-uk-enterprise-data-integration-activation
- Tags: Salesforce, Data Cloud, Databricks, SAP, Marketing Cloud, Data Architecture
- Summary: Led the data integration stream of an enterprise digital transformation program, connecting Databricks, SAP, and Salesforce Data Cloud. Designed governed data layers (atomic to aggregate to CRM-ready) and ensured seamless activation across Marketing Cloud and Salesforce core platform.

### PKO BP: Digital Banking Transformation (IKO and BLIK)
- URL: https://modrzejewski.it/projects/pko-bp-digital-banking-transformation-iko-blik
- Tags: Banking, Digital Transformation, Data Integration, Compliance, IKO, BLIK
- Summary: Supported the digital banking transformation by co-launching the IKO and BLIK platforms, collaborating with IT and data teams to ensure secure, compliant data flows and system integrations across banking channels.
